step.title: Detect test framework
step.action: Detect the test framework in use and select the appropriate execution adapter.
If a test plan exists, load it for context on expected coverage.

step.title: Run test suite
step.action: Run the test suite with structured output enabled (JSON or JUnit reporters).
Capture stdout, stderr, and exit codes for analysis.

step.title: Parse results
step.action: Parse results to extract pass, fail, skip, and total counts.
Extract failure details including test name, error message, and stack trace.

step.title: Analyze failures
step.action: Categorize each failure as real bug, flaky test, or environment issue.
Note patterns such as repeated timeout failures or missing fixtures.

step.title: Collect metrics
step.action: Collect code coverage metrics: line, branch, and function coverage percentages.
Collect duration metrics: total time, slowest tests, average per-test time.

steps.step: <template-output file="docs/testing-artifacts/test-execution-report-.md"> Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with execution results.
